title: Which sorting is applied for groups in a Gantt?

posts.author: HarmLommers (Harm Lommers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

We are using a gantt which has quite some groups in it. The sorting of these groups on the gantt seems to be inconsistent and unpredictable. It’s not sorted on date nor alphabet.

Is this a known bug, or am I missing something here? I can’t find a setting to influence this anywhere.

posts.author: donna567taylor (Donna Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
HarmLommers:

Hi!

We are using a gantt hhaexchange which has quite some groups in it. The sorting of these groups on the gantt seems to be inconsistent and unpredictable. It’s not sorted on date nor alphabet.

Is this a known bug, or am I missing something here? I can’t find a setting to influence this anywhere.

Hello @HarmLommers,
Group sorting in Gantt views often defaults to manual or source table order, not date or alphabet. This behavior is known across platforms like Monday and Wrike. To control it, check if your tool supports custom sorting or cascade options. If not, reordering in the source table may help.

Best Regards,
Donna Taylor

posts.author: HarmLommers (Harm Lommers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Donna,

Which tool? I’m just using the Monday.com Gantt feature. And there I don’t see any option to manipulate this.
